description:
To properly set the group owner of /var/log/secure, run the command: 
$ sudo chgrp adm /var/log/secure
or 
$ sudo chgrp root /var/log/secure
rationale:
The <tt>/var/log/secure</tt> file contains information related to authentication
and authorization privileges and should only be accessed by authorized personnel.
ocil_clause:
/var/log/secure does not have a group owner of
adm or
root
ocil:
To check the group ownership of /var/log/secure, run the command: 
$ ls -lL /var/log/secure
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following group-owner: adm or root
title: Verify Group Who Owns /var/log/secure File
